title: Activities at Camp Barney
excerpt: For our campers, the options are as endless as the smiles. At Camp Barney Medintz, campers enjoy the activities they know and love while also challenging themselves with new adventures every day. Guided by our experienced, certified, and fun specialist staff, our campers spend their days with their friends at their side exploring their every […]
contentHtml:
For our campers, the options are as endless as the smiles. At Camp Barney Medintz, campers enjoy the activities they know and love while also challenging themselves with new adventures every day. Guided by our experienced, certified, and fun specialist staff, our campers spend their days with their friends at their side exploring their every interest.

Below represents just a hint of the fun and adventure that awaits your child. For an example of a typical day at Camp Barney, please view our sample itinerary. For more information about our activities, we invite you to connect with us.

Aquatics

Pool Games, Free Swim, ZUP Boarding, Wakeboarding, Water Skiing, Tubing, Knee Boarding, Canoeing, Paddle Boarding, The Blob, Water Slides, Iceberg Climbing Wall, Rock’It

Nature

Campouts, Cookouts, Hiking Trips, Tree Climbing, Creek Hikes, Jungle Cruise, Instructional Outdoor Cooking

Horseback

Riding, Grooming and Tack, Horse Painting, Horsemanship, Tzaar Ba’alei Hayyim (Caring for Animals)

Sports

Baseball, Basketball, Tennis, Soccer, Martial Arts, Fencing, Archery, Yoga, Gymnastics, Kickball, Gaga, Roller Hockey, Slip’n’slide, Mountain Biking, Knockerball, Running Trails

High Adventure

Zip Lines, High and Low Ropes Courses, Vertical Climbing Walls, Technical Rock Climbing

Creative and Performing Arts

Play Performance, Music, Movie Making, Radio Station, Ceramics, Glass Fusing, Beading, Dance, Arts & Crafts, Tie-Dye, Cooking, Mosaics

Special Events

Color War, Musical, Dances, Cheer Session, Shabbat Concert, Barneyroo

Trips

Older units embark on age-appropriate and super fun trip(s) including Tubing, White Water Rafting, Kayaking, Backpacking, Rock Climbing, Camping, Water Skiing and more.
